{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Key to the western labyrinth
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The key to the western labyrinth is a mummified, chalk-white right hand.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
